## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to Adopt.ai team and explore potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end SEO/AEO strategy and content creation, publishing daily articles with AI workflows and expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Adopt.ai currently produces 6-7 blogs/month, seeking to improve SEO/AEO presence and inbound traffic](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [GrowthX's platform combines AI-driven content generation with human expertise, customizable for technical/specialized topics](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Partnership could potentially start in Q1/Q2, with GrowthX currently booked until Thanksgiving](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Strategy at Adopt.ai

  - [Publish blogs, host webinars and podcasts](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Maintain social media presence on company and founder pages](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Struggling with inbound traffic growth and AEO quotations](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Focusing on low-volume, highly relevant keyword pillars](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Producing 6-7 blogs/month (5 in-house, 2 via agency)](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Experimenting with AI workflows, but quality doesn't meet requirements](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [Daily content publishing for clients](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [End-to-end service: strategy, creation, staging, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [AI workflows with expert oversight for technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Customizable knowledge base and persona artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [3-person team assigned per account: managing director, editor, and content manager](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Analytics and LLM visibility tracking (currently using Scrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

### GrowthX's Platform and Process

  - [Custom AI workflows for brief generation, research, outlining, and drafting](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Fact-checking and expert review steps](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Internal platform for content creation and management](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Plans to offer client access to platform in Q1 next year](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Differentiated from tools like Aerobs by service layer and strategic focus](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

### GrowthX's Client Base

  - [Mix of seed-stage to later-stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Technical clients include Airbyte, Deepgram, WebStacks, AugmentCode, SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Prefer clients with established CMS, blog setup, and defined ICP](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adopt.ai team to review GrowthX's offering and consider potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Possible follow-up meeting for deeper dive into GrowthX's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Consider Q1 or Q2 2026 as potential start date if partnership is pursued](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Tyler to send additional resources and information to Adopt.ai team](https://fathom.video/share/f3sYDo8s5h34uX51kFw687WMhU_ufoFj?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
